framework.name: PayPal Agent Toolkit
framework.description: Developer package for building agentic workflows covering payments, shipment tracking, returns, and customer service. Free to developers with standard transaction fees. Provides AI-agnostic integrations (ChatGPT, Claude), event-driven architecture, and 'advanced tokenization' for payment security.
framework.raw_quote: At the core of this ecosystem is the PayPal Agent Toolkit, a powerful package that enables developers to create sophisticated agentic workflows for automating payments, shipment tracking, returns processing, and customer service interactions.
